title: Morale and welfare
summary: 9609 AS — employee wellbeing, morale drivers, and welfare provision.
learningObjectives: Define morale and welfare at work.
Evaluate link between welfare and productivity.

simpleExplanation.title: Keeping staff healthy and motivated
simpleExplanation.summary: Welfare covers physical and mental wellbeing at work. Good morale reflects confidence and satisfaction in the job.
steps: Support for stress and health issues.

sections.content: **Morale and welfare** (2.1.5) links **HRM** to **motivation 2.2**. Give **concrete welfare examples** from cases.

sections.label: Mark a morale and welfare question
